SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_DESCRIPTION:
The Nemesis Mercenary est a fast-paced, short-range survivor, cum the tools ad dominandum any combat encounter - non matter the odds. 

<color=#CCD3E0>< ! > Splatter deals devastating damage at close range. Utere your other skills ad close the distance.

< ! > Utere Cutthroat ad interrupting attacks, aut ad redirecting your dash versus more enemies.

< ! > Dispatch est a powerful mobility option in combat, et doesn't interrupt your reload.

< ! > Attack Vectors potest blinked to cum nullus cooldown. Hoc facit Exploit a key skill in navigating intense situations.
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, cum newfound purpose in every shell.
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic evanuit, cum emptied munitions et emptier corde.
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_LORE:
"Hey!"


A figure slowly hobbled ex the sandy Martian dunes, tuning into Fort Laughn's external communications. "Hey, mind letting me in? Pulvis out here est killing me."


 
One of the stationed guards on the outer fence quipped back ex a booth. "...Habesne credentials, sir?"



"Come on, you don't recognize me? Sine me guess- new recruit? Aliquod like that?" The figure continued walking nonchalantly toward the fence sicut a second guard piped up. "Hold on. Estne Vantre?" The guest laughed, still wandering every-which-way sicut he came closer to the fence. "Guilty sicut charged. Putabam I'd stop by while I'm in the area. Dic hey to some old comrades, fortasse."



The guards paused, tunc, on a separate line, rang up eorum CO. "Commanding Officer Byren, Vantre's at the outer fence. He appears non-threatening, quod est an immediate red flag. Quae sunt your orders?"



Byren's scratchy, exasperated voice chirped back per the receiver. "Ugh, damnit... Page the suppression crew. Make sure he's non trying anything, recte? Keep him busy donec you've got more people out there." The guard relayed the order- "Get a crew out here. I'll make sure Vantre doesn't try anything stupid." The recruit replied cum a question: "Sure, sed, uhh... Ubi'd he go?"



Sure satis, Vantre had vanished dum the two were distracted, relinquens nihil sed sparks in the air ubi he once stood. It took the entirety of the fort's stationed force about ten minutes ad figurandum out what erat going on- et they found out at about the same tempus they found eorum commanding officer dead in his quarters, the back of his head blasted ad smithereens.
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_PRIMARY_SHOTGUN_DE: <style=cIsUtility>Agile</style>. Puga shotgun blast pro <style=cIsDamage>6x80% vulnere</style>, et again when released. Potest habere usque ad 2 shells.
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SECONDARY_SLASH_DE: <style=cIsDamage>Staggering.</style> Lunge et slash pro <style=cIsDamage>2x300% vulnere</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Potest used while dashing</style>.
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SECONDARY_KNIFE_DE: <style=cIsHealth>Bleeding.</style> Throw a knife pro <style=cIsDamage>100% vulnere</style>. \n<style=cIsDamage>Slayer.</style> Get close ad rip eum ex et deal <style=cIsDamage>400% vulnere</style>.
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_UTILITY_SLIDE_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Stunning.</style> Tene ad <style=cIsUtility>slide</style> while preparing a targeted dash quod deal <style=cIsDamage>600% vulnere</style>.
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SPECIAL_SCAN_DESCR: Reveal <style=cIsUtility>attack vectors</style> around up to <style=cIsDamage>4</style> nearby enemies. <style=cIsUtility>Move into position</style> ad dash forward, infligens <style=cIsDamage>1200% vulnere</style>.
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SPECIAL_CLONE_DESC: Summon a <style=cIsUtility>clone</style> behind a target quod <style=cIsDamage>copies your abilities</style>. Recast ad dash to eum, infligens <style=cIsDamage>800% vulnere</style>.
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SPECIAL_CLONE_DASH: Dash to your clone, infligens <style=cIsDamage>800% vulnere</style>.
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SPECIAL_SCEPTER_SC: Reveal <style=cIsUtility>attack vectors</style> around up to <style=cIsDamage>4</style> nearby enemies. <style=cIsUtility>Move into position</style> ad dash forward, infligens <style=cIsDamage>1500% vulnere</style>.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: Reveal 2 extra attack vectors et deal 1500% vulnere.</color>
SS2_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SPECIAL_SCEPTER_CL: Summon a <style=cIsUtility>clone</style> behind a target quod <style=cIsDamage>copies your abilities</style>. Recast ad dash to eum, infligens <style=cIsDamage>800% vulnere</style>.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTER: Gain an extra dash.</color>
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_MASTER: Ut Nemesis Mercenary, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon aut difficiliori.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_GRANDM: Ut Nemesis Mercenary, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_NEMESI: Ut Nemesis Mercenary, vince Mercenary's vestige.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_CLONE_: Ut Nemesis Mercenary, eme Duplicator Drone.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_KNIFE_: Ut Nemesis Mercenary, vince diversum vestige.
SS2_ACHIEVEMENT_NEMESIS_MERCENARY_SLIDE_: Ut Nemesis Mercenary, completa stadium sine relinquendo terrain.
